english: Step Back to Ride the Tiger
visual: Steps back into an empty stance with one hand raised above the head and the other lowered beside the hip, body turned at an angle.
motion_description: The person steps the right leg backward, shifting their weight entirely onto it, while the left foot rests lightly on the floor in an empty stance. Simultaneously, the right arm sweeps downward to rest beside the right hip, and the left arm arcs upward, stopping with the hand near head height. The torso rotates to the right as the arms separate, finishing the sequence with a deliberate pause in this grounded, asymmetric posture before returning to a neutral standing position.
